original: a rocket-assisted greathammer
A huge, heavy warhammer, brought into the current age with inertial compensation and rocket assistance. All that weight makes it heavy and impractical for all but the strongest fighters.
plasma halberd
a hyraxi raider’s plasma halberd

Partly damaged during your battle with the raiders atop the train on Phaedra II, this halberd blew out one plasma emitter, leaving the other stuck wide-open - and plenty hot enough to cut and cauterize its way through a starship’s hull.
Flaming Axe
flaming axe
a flaming axe

Electric guitars may be known as axes, but that doesn’t mean this one comes with a cutting edge. It was shaped from a heavy piece of scrap metal, too blunt to cut but too stiff to mind a little percussive maintenance. The hyraxi built this flame-belching instrument for heft and durability, the better to accompanying their roaring war-march to a pillaging victory. Portable plasma jets allow it to belch flame on command.

Hureya’s Claw
Hureya’s Claw

This fearsome claw was once wielded by the hyraxi warlord, Hureya. Resembling a huge paw with sickle-sized claws, this fist weapon crackles with enough electrified current to barbecue a varmint. A weapon for those who like to be up close - at any cost.

Appearance Enabled
Custom Appearance

As you take a moment to check out the yeen raider, the first thing that catches your attention are his massive balls. They’re so large that his crotch-flap utterly fails to conceal their underside. They spill into plain view with his slightest movement, and the only thing that gives him a semblance of decency is his dark underwear, whose color blends with the crotch-flap to create the appearance of something that passes for pants on a cursory glance. Following that, your gaze goes to his broad hips and ass. Looking at so many acres of bubblebutt, even a saint would be tempted to grab it, give it a smack, or preferably both. It’s hard to pay attention to the rest of him when he’s got such whopping assets drawing the eye like magnets, but once you manage to stop staring at his waist level, you realize that the boy’s got a lot more going for him. For starters, his body is quite athletic, lined with muscles that are visible but not overly defined. His pecs, in particular, look quite beefy, and the yellow-gray fur on his forelimbs does a great job of framing his biceps and thighs. Even more impressive, however, is the fact that you can’t spot a single scar on his chocolate skin — for a raider, that would mean he’s either extremely good at his job, or extremely lucky. Or maybe hyraxi medicine is simply more advanced than you gave it credit for. Last but not least, your eyes fall on his visage: the raider’s face is androgynous and pretty, with a hint of masculinity on his jawline that gives him a slightly boyish look. It is framed by a purple mane of fashionably-shaggy hair reaching down to his neck, while bangs cover part of his brow and left eye, making the yeen look more like a pop idol than someone you would find on Phaedra. To top it off, his big mouth is always curled into some kind of cocky smile, giving the raider a resting brat face that is thematically matched by his choker. It has the letters B.R.A.T. engraved on a golden plate, complete with a loop for someone to pass a leash through. For a self-proclaimed alpha, he has an... interesting taste in accessories. As your gaze meets his vibrant light-green eyes, the boy gives you a wink and wiggles his hyena ears happily. “Done looking? How about you[pc.isBiped| get on all fours for me| turn around and let me fuck you] now,[pc.mfn| handsome| cutie| cutie]?” [pc.isSubby|[pc.hasCock|Your [pc.cocksNounSimple] twitch[s|es] at the invitation, and for a moment|For a moment,] you actually fantasize about letting this smug boy empty his huge balls in you...|[pc.isDommy|Damn, it’s like every time this brat opens his mouth, it makes you want to[pc.hasCock| bend him over| spank his smug ass]!]]

Hyraxi Warbitch

Wind whips past the towering Warbitch. Spinning her spear around and around, she faces you down, carefully sizing you up. Corded muscles twitch, ready to strike at a moment’s notice. Scraps of cloth flutter and fret in the racing gust of wind thanks to the speed of the train under both of you, but her imperious stature remains unphased. It’s all the more impressive considering that same buffeting force feels strong enough to blow you straight off your [pc.feet]!

Hyraxi Grenadier

The gaping barrel of the Hyraxi Grenadier’s massive launcher is pointed right at you, ready to unleash a barrage of explosive pain. As large as the launcher is, it looks positively quaint clutched in the Hyraxi’s massive paws, her sturdy, muscular frame bursting out of her ill-fitted armor -- and giving you an eye-full of her powerful muscles as much of her massive, half-exposed breasts.

You’re fighting the Warmistress! She’s a big hunk of hyraxi meat, wearing a suit of pre-Glass combat armor that makes her far more imposing than even her bigger subordinates. One of her hands is fitted into a crackling claw weapon, while the other is carrying a hammer that looks more than capable of denting the armor on a tank. All around you, terrified divrani engineers are cheering you on, hoping beyond hope you’ll knock some sense into this fierce amazon.
